nasb.text: You shall not make other gods besides Me; gods of silver or gods of gold, you shall not make for yourselves.

esv.text: You shall not make gods of silver to be with me, nor shall you make for yourselves gods of gold.

cnv.text: 你們不可做銀的神像和金的神像和我相比，你們決不可為自己做這些神像。

ccb.text: 除了敬拜我之外，不可为自己制造金银神像。
